title: A Resolution authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Neil Andrew N. Nocon to enter and sign into and execute a Memorandum of Agreement / Understanding (MOA/MOU) with any Academic and Technical-Vocational Institutions duly recognized by DepEd, CHED, and TESDA for the implementation of On-the-Job Training (OJT) and Work Immersion Programs in the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) and Ratifying the same thereafter.
